summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. #84028 is security-sensitive and is routed to central OpenClaw security handling with no ProjectClownfish mutation. No remaining PR has complete merge preflight proof: mergeability is unknown, hydrated comments/review comments are absent, and no Codex /review result is present. #84156 looks narrow and promising but needs full merge preflight. #84060 and #84157 are labeled waiting on author, with #84157 also blocked by failing checks. #84140 is broad formatter churn across many surfaces and matches the job's broad-code-delta human gate.

actions.reason: Route the exact security-sensitive PR to central OpenClaw security handling. Do not merge, close, comment on, label, or repair it through ProjectClownfish.
Active author follow-up label plus missing merge preflight blocks merge recommendation.
Broad formatter churn across many ownership areas triggers the job's broad_code_delta human gate and is not suitable for merge or autonomous repair from this shard.
Narrow and likely repairable/mergeable, but compatibility risk and missing required merge preflight mean a maintainer/preflight step is required before merge_candidate.
Active author follow-up, high-risk session/message-delivery labels, and failing checks block merge. Human or refreshed repair planning is needed after author/check status is resolved.

needs_human: #84060: PR is labeled waiting on author and lacks complete merge preflight.
#84140: broad dirty formatter PR across many surfaces triggers the broad_code_delta human gate.
